expectations.text: Proposes two different S4-related destination names (one per agent), not a single shared S4HANA for both
expectations.evidence: destinations.json uses name S4HANA for both invoice-agent and gr-agent; collision_note states both request S4HANA.

expectations.text: Both proposed S4 destination names include a per-agent discriminator
expectations.evidence: Both agents use identical destination name S4HANA with no agent discriminator.

expectations.text: AICORE is shared / same name for both agents
expectations.evidence: Both agents list destination AICORE; deploy_plan.md marks AICORE as shared intentional.

expectations.text: Generated loaders still populate S4_BASE_URL / S4_USERNAME / S4_PASSWORD (system-stable env prefix)
expectations.evidence: destinations.json env_mapping and deploy_plan document S4_BASE_URL / S4_USERNAME / S4_PASSWORD for both loaders.

notes: Baseline correctly shows shared-subaccount S4HANA name collision between two agents.
